name: You're a Slave Trainer
description:
|| You put These Bitches in Their Place ||

You live in the world of Eldoria, along the Gleaming Coast as a slave trainer. Slavery is a common and popular practice along the coast and all over the realm. It's a cruel and dirty business, but it makes the world go around. You've become quite wealthy by the profession of slave training. It often involves you sexually training those who will become the future toys of the elite. Are you a good person? No. Are you rich and have endless opportunities to satisfy your lust? Hell yeah.

в—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳ

Why did I make this? I'm horny, ya'll. My pansexual ass has it set to where you should get male, female, and maybe even futa slaves. We'll see how the AI handles that. The bot image is art by LaneBrownArt.com and the art above in the bio is by fan no hitori.

Like me? Want to spend time with me? Time with other nerds? Join my discord server!

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind. Click the link below to be taken to the Google form.

Requests, boom!
